root_help.stdout_tail:
Usage: cli.py [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                                      
                                                                                
 MatrixLab receipt runner v0.2                                                  
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.      │
│ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to copy │
│                               it or customize the installation.              │
│ --help                        Show this message and exit.                    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ run                                                                          │
│ stress                                      Deliberately push the runner     │
│                                             until halt reasons appear.       │
│ summarize                                   Show run summary from SQLite.    │
│ inspect                                     Inspect receipts for one case.   │
│ analyze                                     Analyze where and how the latest │
│                                             run broke.                       │
│ profiles                                    Show compact move-profile        │
│                                             counts.                          │
│ coarse-profiles                             Compare raw move-profile counts  │
│                                             against coarse normalized        │
│                                             profile counts.                  │
│ laws                                        Summarize expected-law checks by │
│                                             family and move.                 │
│ recover-collision                           Recover a run_id collision by    │
│                                             splitting receipt rows whose     │
│                                             family is not in the stored run  │
│                                             family set.                      │
│ gate                                        Exit nonzero if a run violates   │
│                                             law checks or is incomplete.     │
│ agent-eval                                  Emit a machine-readable          │
│                                             agent/eval report for one run,   │
│                                             optionally compared to a         │
│                                             previous run.                    │
│ agent-select                                Select the next command from a   │
│                                             fixed allowlist based on an      │
│                                             explicit agent-eval JSON report. │
│ agent-plan-check                            Validate a content-addressed     │
│                                             agent-select receipt before any  │
│                                             execution layer exists.          │
│ agent-exec-dry-run                          Emit a dry-run executor receipt  │
│                                             from a PASS agent-plan-check     │
│                                             receipt. Does not execute        │
│                                             subprocesses.                    │
│ agent-post-check                            Verify that a manual execution   │
│                                             result matches a prior PASS      │
│                                             executor dry-run receipt.        │
│ agent-loop-summary                          Emit a compact receipt card for  │
│                                             one complete operator-mediated   │
│                                             agent loop.                      │
│ agent-confirm-loop                          Record explicit operator         │
│                                             confirmation for a completed     │
│                                             PASS loop summary.               │
│ agent-next-from-confirmation                Consume a PASS continue          │
│                                             confirmation and emit the next   │
│                                             fixed selector receipt from its  │
│                                             allowed eval source.             │
│ agent-cycle-ledger                          Build a machine-readable cycle   │
│                                             ledger from explicit loop        │
│                                             summary receipts.                │
│ agent-cycle-next                            Select the next controlled       │
│                                             experiment from a cycle ledger.  │
│ agent-cycle-observe                         Validate and record the observed │
│                                             result of a cycle-next           │
│                                             execution.                       │
│ agent-cycle-append-observation              Append a clean cycle observation │
│                                             to an existing cycle ledger.     │
│ agent-cheat-check                           Read-only cheating detector for  │
│                                             baseline stability claims.       │
│ agent-cheat-adversarial                     Adversarial cheating detector    │
│                                             using real temp DB mutations     │
│                                             only.                            │
│ cell-transfer-contract                      Create a                         │
│                                             measurement-discipline-only      │
│                                             transfer contract between cells. │
│ domain-shift-generator                      Create a Cell 1 domain-shift     │
│                                             generator manifest without       │
│                                             running it.                      │
│ domain-shift-runner-support                 Validate executable runner       │
│                                             support for a domain-shift       │
│                                             generator manifest.              │
│ domain-shift-slot-runner-support            Create slot-separated runner     │
│                                             support for repeated-family      │
│                                             domain shifts.                   │
│ radius-expansion-candidate-decision         Build exact-radius candidate     │
│                                             decision under burden policy.    │
│ radius-expansion-candidate-decision-verify  Reload and verify an             │
│                                             exact-radius candidate decision. │
│ radius-expansion-burden-policy              Build radius expansion burden    │
│                                             policy after the verified R100   │
│                                             decision.                        │
│ radius-expansion-burden-policy-verify       Reload and verify a radius       │
│                                             expansion burden policy.         │
│ r100-scale-decision-with-rollup             Decide R100 scale outcome using  │
│                                             the verified burden rollup.      │
│ r100-scale-decision-with-rollup-verify      Reload and verify an R100 scale  │
│                                             decision with verified rollup.   │
│ verified-r100-burden-rollup                 Build verified R100 burden       │
│                                             rollups from raw manifests.      │
│ verified-r100-burden-rollup-verify          Reload and verify a verified     │
│                                             R100 burden rollup bundle.       │
│ receipt-rollup-contract                     Build the post-R100 receipt      │
│                                             rollup contract.                 │
│ receipt-rollup-contract-verify              Reload and verify a receipt      │
│                                             rollup contract.                 │
│ r100-radius-scale-observation               Build the R50/R75/R100 scale     │
│                                             observation with explicit burden │
│                                             evaluation.                      │
│ r100-radius-scale-observation-verify        Reload and verify an R100 radius │
│                                             scale observation.               │
│ r75-scale-decision                          Decide the R75 scale outcome and │
│                                             whether the next radius is       │
│                                             licensed.                        │
│ r75-scale-decision-verify                   Reload and verify an R75 scale   │
│                                             decision receipt from disk.      │
│ radius-scale-observation                    Compare R75 slot observation     │
│                                             against the R50 baseline under   │
│                                             the scalability contract.        │
│ radius-scale-observation-verify             Reload and verify a radius scale │
│                                             observation from disk.           │
│ scalability-contract                        Build the post-R50/pre-R75       │
│                                             first-order scalability          │
│                                             contract.                        │
│ scalability-contract-verify                 Reload and verify a scalability  │
│                                             contract from disk.              │
│ domain-shift-slot-observe                   Observe a slot-separated         │
│                                             domain-shift execution and       │
│                                             classify transfer outcome.       │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

help.stdout_tail:
Usage: cli.py run [OPTIONS]                                                    
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --depth-min                              INTEGER  Smallest starting cycle    │
│                                                   size.                      │
│                                                   [default: 3]               │
│ --depth-max                              INTEGER  Largest starting cycle     │
│                                                   size.                      │
│                                                   [default: 8]               │
│ --families                               TEXT     Family letters: A,B,C,D,E. │
│                                                   [default: A,B,C,D,E]       │
│ --cycles-per-case                        INTEGER  Cycles per case. 0 means   │
│                                                   depth_max.                 │
│                                                   [default: 0]               │
│ --max-cells                              INTEGER  Hard matrix cell limit     │
│                                                   before halt.               │
│                                                   [default: 250000]          │
│ --strict-laws        --no-strict-laws             Halt immediately on law    │
│                                                   failure.                   │
│                                                   [default: no-strict-laws]  │
│ --run-id                                 TEXT     Optional run id.           │
│ --help                                            Show this message and      │
│                                                   exit.                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py agent-cycle-ledger [OPTIONS] LOOP_SUMMARIES...                   
                                                                                
 Build a machine-readable cycle ledger from explicit loop summary receipts.     
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    loop_summaries      LOOP_SUMMARIES...  Explicit loop_summary ids or     │
│                                             JSON paths, in cycle order.      │
│                                             [required]                       │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py agent-cycle-next [OPTIONS] CYCLE_LEDGER                          
                                                                                
 Select the next controlled experiment from a cycle ledger.                     
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    cycle_ledger      TEXT  Explicit cycle ledger id or JSON path.          │
│                              [required]                                      │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --depth-step                         INTEGER  Continuation-radius expansion  │
│                                               step.                          │
│                                               [default: 50]                  │
│ --families                           TEXT     Move families for the next     │
│                                               controlled stress run.         │
│                                               [default: ABCDE]               │
│ --max-cells                          INTEGER  Max cells for the next         │
│                                               controlled stress run.         │
│                                               [default: 50000]               │
│ --strict-laws    --no-strict-laws             Preserve strict law checking   │
│                                               for the next controlled stress │
│                                               run.                           │
│                                               [default: strict-laws]         │
│ --help                                        Show this message and exit.    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py agent-cycle-observe [OPTIONS] CYCLE_NEXT OBSERVED_EVAL           
                                                                                
 Validate and record the observed result of a cycle-next execution.             
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    cycle_next         TEXT  Explicit cycle-next id or JSON path.           │
│                               [required]                                     │
│ *    observed_eval      TEXT  Explicit observed agent-eval id or JSON path.  │
│                               [required]                                     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py agent-cycle-append-observation [OPTIONS] CYCLE_LEDGER            
                                              CYCLE_OBSERVATION                 
                                                                                
 Append a clean cycle observation to an existing cycle ledger.                  
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    cycle_ledger           TEXT  Explicit cycle ledger id or JSON path.     │
│                                   [required]                                 │
│ *    cycle_observation      TEXT  Explicit clean cycle observation id or     │
│                                   JSON path.                                 │
│                                   [required]                                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py domain-shift-runner-support [OPTIONS] DOMAIN_SHIFT_GENERATOR     
                                                                                
 Validate executable runner support for a domain-shift generator manifest.      
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    domain_shift_generator      TEXT  Passing domain shift generator id or  │
│                                        JSON path.                            │
│                                        [required]                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py domain-shift-slot-runner-support [OPTIONS]                       
                                                DOMAIN_SHIFT_GENERATOR          
                                                                                
 Create slot-separated runner support for repeated-family domain shifts.        
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    domain_shift_generator      TEXT  Passing domain shift generator id or  │
│                                        JSON path.                            │
│                                        [required]                            │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py r100-radius-scale-observation [OPTIONS] [R100_OBSERVATION]       
                                                                                
 Build the R50/R75/R100 scale observation with explicit burden evaluation.      
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│   r100_observation      [R100_OBSERVATION]  R100 domain shift slot           │
│                                             observation id or JSON path.     │
│                                             [default: 5a442f0c]              │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --decision        TEXT  R75 scale decision id or JSON path.                  │
│                         [default: 0bbd1bbd]                                  │
│ --r75-rso         TEXT  R50-to-R75 radius scale observation id or JSON path. │
│                         [default: b9420863]                                  │
│ --help                  Show this message and exit.                          │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py r75-scale-decision [OPTIONS] [RADIUS_SCALE_OBSERVATION]          
                                                                                
 Decide the R75 scale outcome and whether the next radius is licensed.          
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│   radius_scale_observat…      [RADIUS_SCALE_OBSERVAT  Radius scale           │
│                               ION]                    observation id or JSON │
│                                                       path.                  │
│                                                       [default: b9420863]    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py radius-scale-observation [OPTIONS] [R75_OBSERVATION]             
                                                                                
 Compare R75 slot observation against the R50 baseline under the scalability    
 contract.                                                                      
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│   r75_observation      [R75_OBSERVATION]  R75 domain shift slot observation  │
│                                           id or JSON path.                   │
│                                           [default: 601a7983]                │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --contract        TEXT  Scalability contract id or JSON path.                │
│                         [default: ba39cd7b]                                  │
│ --help                  Show this message and exit.                          │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Usage: cli.py radius-scale-observation-verify [OPTIONS]                        
                                               RADIUS_SCALE_OBSERVATION         
                                                                                
 Reload and verify a radius scale observation from disk.                        
                                                                                
╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    radius_scale_observation      TEXT  Radius scale observation id or JSON │
│                                          path.                               │
│                                          [required]                          │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --help          Show this message and exit.                                  │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
